declarations.description:
Visual indicator that tracks the active tab's position via CSS custom properties.
Position inside `<grund-tabs-list>`. Consumer uses the exposed custom properties
to animate or style the indicator relative to the active tab.
declarations.name: GrundTabsIndicator

cssProperties.description: Distance from list left edge to active tab left edge
cssProperties.name: --grund-tabs-indicator-left

cssProperties.description: Distance from list top edge to active tab top edge
cssProperties.name: --grund-tabs-indicator-top

cssProperties.description: Distance from list right edge to active tab right edge
cssProperties.name: --grund-tabs-indicator-right

cssProperties.description: Distance from list bottom edge to active tab bottom edge
cssProperties.name: --grund-tabs-indicator-bottom

members.name: listEl
members.description: The `<grund-tabs-list>` this indicator is inside. Located in connectedCallback.

members.name: observedTab
members.description: The active tab element being observed, used to detect when the active tab changes.

declarations.description: Container for tab triggers. Manages keyboard navigation via roving tabindex.
declarations.name: GrundTabsList

members.name: rovingFocus
members.default: new RovingFocusController(this, { orientation: 'horizontal', loop: true, getItems: () => this.getTabButtons(), })

declarations.description: Content panel associated with a tab by matching value.
declarations.name: GrundTabsPanel

declarations.description: Root tabs container. Provides context to tab list, tabs, and panels.
declarations.name: GrundTabs

declarations.description: Individual tab trigger. Renders an accessible button inside shadow DOM.
declarations.name: GrundTab

members.name: triggerElement
members.description: Exposes the inner button for RovingFocusController on the list to manage tabindex.

declarations.description:
A standalone pressable toggle button with `aria-pressed` state.
Also the primitive element used inside `<grund-toggle-group>`.
declarations.name: GrundToggle

members.name: pressed
members.description:
Whether the toggle is pressed. Setting this enables controlled mode.
In controlled mode the element fires `grund-pressed-change` but does not
update internal state — the consumer must reflect the new value back.
Has no effect when inside `<grund-toggle-group>` (group owns pressed state).

members.name: defaultPressed
members.description:
Initial pressed state for uncontrolled mode. Ignored after the first render.
Has no effect when inside `<grund-toggle-group>`.

members.name: value
members.description:
Identifier for this toggle. Has no effect on the standalone element;
used by `<grund-toggle-group>` to identify which item is pressed.

attributes.name: pressed
attributes.description:
Whether the toggle is pressed. Setting this enables controlled mode.
In controlled mode the element fires `grund-pressed-change` but does not
update internal state — the consumer must reflect the new value back.
Has no effect when inside `<grund-toggle-group>` (group owns pressed state).

attributes.name: default-pressed
attributes.description:
Initial pressed state for uncontrolled mode. Ignored after the first render.
Has no effect when inside `<grund-toggle-group>`.

attributes.name: value
attributes.description:
Identifier for this toggle. Has no effect on the standalone element;
used by `<grund-toggle-group>` to identify which item is pressed.

declarations.description: Heading wrapper for an accordion item trigger.
declarations.name: GrundAccordionHeader

declarations.description: Accordion item container. Bridges root and leaf element context.
declarations.name: GrundAccordionItem

events.name: grund-open-change
events.description: When this item's open state changes (after initial mount)

declarations.description: Collapsible content region of an accordion item.
declarations.name: GrundAccordionPanel

declarations.description: Root accordion container. Provides context to accordion items.
declarations.name: GrundAccordion

members.name: rovingFocus
members.default: new RovingFocusController(this, { orientation: 'vertical', loop: true, getItems: () => this.registry.items .map((r) => r.trigger?.shadowRoot?.querySelector<HTMLElement>('[part="trigger"]') ?? null) .filter((t): t is HTMLElement => t !== null), })

declarations.description: Button that toggles an accordion panel open/closed.
declarations.name: GrundAccordionTrigger

declarations.description: Root toggle group container. Manages selection state across child `<grund-toggle>` elements.
declarations.name: GrundToggleGroup

cssParts.description: The inner container element Accessibility: provide an accessible name via the `label` property (`aria-label` on the inner group container). External `aria-labelledby` cannot cross shadow-root boundaries to reach the inner container — use the `label` prop instead.
cssParts.name: group

members.name: value
members.description:
The controlled set of pressed toggle values.
Setting this enables controlled mode — the element fires `grund-value-change`
but does not update internal state; the consumer must reflect the new value back.

members.name: defaultValue
members.description: Initial pressed values for uncontrolled mode. Ignored after the first render.

members.name: multiple
members.description: Whether multiple toggles can be pressed simultaneously.

members.name: disabled
members.description: Whether all toggles in the group are disabled.

members.name: orientation
members.description: Orientation used for keyboard navigation arrow keys.

members.name: loop
members.description: Whether keyboard navigation wraps from last to first and vice versa.

members.name: label
members.description:
Accessible name for the group container, applied as `aria-label` on the
inner `role="group"` element. Required for screen-reader users unless the
group is labelled by a visible heading via `aria-labelledby` on the host.

members.name: rovingFocus
members.default: new RovingFocusController(this, { orientation: 'horizontal', loop: true, getItems: () => this.registry.toggles .map((r) => r.element.shadowRoot?.querySelector<HTMLElement>('[part="button"]') ?? null) .filter((btn): btn is HTMLElement => btn !== null), })

members.name: handleToggle
members.description: Returns the resolved pressed state for the toggled item, or null if blocked.

events.name: grund-value-change
events.description: When the set of pressed toggles changes

attributes.name: value
attributes.description:
The controlled set of pressed toggle values.
Setting this enables controlled mode — the element fires `grund-value-change`
but does not update internal state; the consumer must reflect the new value back.

attributes.name: default-value
attributes.description: Initial pressed values for uncontrolled mode. Ignored after the first render.

attributes.name: multiple
attributes.description: Whether multiple toggles can be pressed simultaneously.

attributes.name: disabled
attributes.description: Whether all toggles in the group are disabled.

attributes.name: orientation
attributes.description: Orientation used for keyboard navigation arrow keys.

attributes.name: loop
attributes.description: Whether keyboard navigation wraps from last to first and vice versa.

attributes.name: label
attributes.description:
Accessible name for the group container, applied as `aria-label` on the
inner `role="group"` element. Required for screen-reader users unless the
group is labelled by a visible heading via `aria-labelledby` on the host.
